name: ragdoll-monorepo
description: Ragdoll monorepo - animated character framework and apps
author: Vokality

scripts.build: bun run build:libraries && bun run build:examples && bun run build:apps
scripts.build:libraries: bun run --filter @vokality/ragdoll build && bun run --filter @vokality/ragdoll-extensions build && bun run --filter '@vokality/ragdoll-extension-*' build
scripts.build:apps: bun run --filter lumen build && bun run --filter emote build
scripts.test: bun run build:libraries && bun run --workspaces --if-present test
scripts.typecheck: bun run build:libraries && bun run typecheck:libraries && bun run --filter '@example/*' typecheck && bun run --filter lumen typecheck && bun run --filter emote typecheck
scripts.typecheck:libraries: bun run --filter @vokality/ragdoll typecheck && bun run --filter @vokality/ragdoll-extensions typecheck && bun run --filter '@vokality/ragdoll-extension-*' typecheck
scripts.verify:packages: bun run build:libraries && bun run build:examples && bun run scripts/verify-packages.ts
scripts.clean: bun run scripts/clean.ts packages/ragdoll/dist packages/ragdoll-extensions/dist packages/ragdoll-extension-character/dist packages/ragdoll-extension-pomodoro/dist packages/ragdoll-extension-spotify/dist packages/ragdoll-extension-tasks/dist packages/ragdoll-extension-tic-tac-toe/dist apps/chat/dist apps/emote/dist examples/extension-weather/dist
